article.title: SDE2 | Uber | Compensation Details
article.content:
Hi, I recently interviewed at Uber for SDE2 position, and here are my compensation details.

**Background:**
2 years experience at a Tier1 PBC
Location: India

**Prev Compensation**
Base: ₹21 L
Stocks: ₹14 L
Perf Bonus: 3.5L
TC: 38.5 L

**Comp Details:**
Base: ₹49 L (PF+Gratuity excl.)
Stocks: $88 k (4 yrs, equally vesting monthly)
Performance Bonus: 7-14L based on perf
Relocation: 2 L

Benefits: Standard Uber benefits(70K per year for wellness + 50$ per month for Internet, Electricity bill, 5k INR worth Uber coupons etc.)
Total Comp (1st Year): Close to 80 LPA (Including expected PF)

post.content:
are you 2023 batch ?
How did you get interview opportunity ?
I am 2024 batch given Uber oa 2 times have solved all 3 questions even than I haven't received interview opportunity.
Can you tell should I try directly as SDE2 at uber next year ?
This role was for which location ?
Hey, can you please share your prep strategy, the resources you followed etc, would be of great help
@Anonymous User meta offer was for SDE1 or SDE2? Also what was meta comp. Congrats for the great offer.
prev comp and did you have any competing offers ?
Just be aware of work culture, seems like new amazon (what i heard from community) but great brand value
